'''hamawa''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:xylofucoglycuronan|xylofucoglycuronan]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| h-m-w
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:xylofucoglycuronan|xylofucoglycuronan]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| hamawa
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:hæmæwæth|hæmæwæth]] || [[word:hæmæwæj|hæmæwæj]] || [[word:hæmæwæsh|hæmæwæsh]] || [[word:hæmæwæ|hæmæwæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:hamamawath|hamamawath]] || [[word:hamamawaj|hamamawaj]] || [[word:hamamawash|hamamawash]] || [[word:hamamawa|hamamawa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:hamawath|hamawath]] || [[word:hamawaj|hamawaj]] || [[word:hamawash|hamawash]] || [[word:hamawa|hamawa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:hamafwath|hamafwath]] || [[word:hamafwaj|hamafwaj]] || [[word:hamafwash|hamafwash]] || [[word:hamafwaf|hamafwaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:hamawatha|hamawatha]] || [[word:hamawaja|hamawaja]] || [[word:hamawasha|hamawasha]] || [[word:hamawaka|hamawaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:hamawath|hamawath]] || [[word:hamawaj|hamawaj]] || [[word:hamawash|hamawash]] || [[word:hamawa|hamawa]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:hamawathal|hamawathal]] || [[word:hamawajal|hamawajal]] || [[word:hamawashal|hamawashal]] || [[word:hamawakal|hamawakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:hamawathatha|hamawathatha]] || [[word:hamawajaja|hamawajaja]] || [[word:hamawashasha|hamawashasha]] || [[word:hamawaka|hamawaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:hamawathan|hamawathan]] || [[word:hamawajan|hamawajan]] || [[word:hamawashan|hamawashan]] || [[word:hamawakan|hamawakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:hamawathaoro|hamawathaoro]] || [[word:hamawajaoro|hamawajaoro]] || [[word:hamawashaoro|hamawashaoro]] || [[word:hamawakaoro|hamawakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|654f723}}
